title: CMS INDUSLAW, Pioneer Legal act on SFO Technologies $82 million fundraise
description: SFO Technologies Private Limited has raised $82 million from a fundraise led by Trident Growth Partners and Amicus Capital, with participation from existing investors Anicut Capital and HDFC Asset Management Capital.CMS INDUSLAW advised SFO Technologies on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Rashi Saraf (Partner), Martin Mathews (Senior Associate), Surbhi Joshi (Senior Associate), Arnesh Nag (Associate) and Radhika Chauhan (Associate).Rashi SarafPioneer Legal advised lead investors
